5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-201", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data"}], "description": "Using a crafted POST request to bug_monitor_add.php, a user with project-level access can add themselves as a monitor for a private issue they do not have access to. Despite displaying an Access Denied error, the application accepts the request and creates a monitor relationship for the private issue.


### Impact
Direct access to the private issue remains blocked, but the user will receive email notifications for updates, leading to disclosure of the private issue's metadata and content.

### Patches
- 0a93267deba445fb9d15250c16e6fdb1246ffa65

### Workarounds
None

### Credits
Thanks to Vishal Shukla for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00363, "percentile": 0.28503}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34579"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T23:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:32:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/0a93267deba445fb9d15250c16e6fdb1246ffa65", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=36975", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34579", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT has an authorization bypass in private issue monitoring", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:12:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-ggw7-9675-6v4v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.1, <= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT has an authorization bypass in private issue monitoring
